patterns.code: await fs.unlink(filePath).catch(() => {});

recommendations.suggestion: Replace bare catches with at least console.warn logging, or propagate error to caller
HarnessMemory save failures should emit events or retry, not just log to console
Standardize on Logger utility for all error logging; add structured logging support

recommendations.observation: Some functions throw, some return error objects, some use callbacks
recommendations.suggestion: Consider standardizing on Result<T, E> pattern or consistent exception hierarchy

recommendations.observation: Various formats: [Context] message, Context: message, just message
recommendations.suggestion: Standardize error message format across the codebase
Consider cumulative error tracking for best-effort operations

good_patterns.example: const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error'
throw new Error(`Failed to export HTML: ${error.message}`)
good_patterns.benefit: Preserves error chain while adding context
